description: T-S K5, 16-40. Exercises of children, representing leters in various combinations and copies of the beginnings of the third and the first books of Moses. (Information from Goitein's note cards) A child’s writing exercises, consisting of the Hebrew alphabet followed by each letter repeated with the various Tiberian vowels. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: תרגילי כתיבת ילד: האלפבית העברי ואחריו כל אות עם הניקוד הטברני השונה
